seoTitle: Pasadena ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks, First Day & PDF
seoDescription: View the Pasadena ISD Calendar 2026-2027 with first day of school, holidays, fall break, winter break, spring break, early dismissal dates, PDF and calendar download.
heroSummary: Pasadena ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on Thursday, August 13, 2026 and ends on Friday, May 21, 2027, with early dismissal. Winter Break runs December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027, and Spring Break runs March 8-12, 2027.
calendarNotes: Pasadena ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year for all students on August 13, 2026 and lists May 21, 2027 as the last day for students with early dismissal. Fall Break runs October 9-13, Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 8-12. Graduation is listed as a May 20-21, 2027 window.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pasadena ISD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Pasadena ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year for all students on Thursday, August 13, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pasadena ISD Fall Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Pasadena ISD Fall Break runs Friday, October 9 through Tuesday, October 13, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When do Pasadena ISD students return after Winter Break?
calendarFaqs.a: Pasadena ISD students return after Winter Break on Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pasadena ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 8 through Friday, March 12, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Pasadena ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Friday, May 21, 2027, with early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Pasadena ISD have early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Pasadena ISD lists early dismissal on December 18, 2026 and May 21, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in Pasadena ISD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The Pasadena ISD 2026-2027 calendar lists 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: How many no-school days does Pasadena ISD have in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Outside the major Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break ranges, Pasadena ISD lists 9 scheduled student no-school weekdays during the 2026-2027 school year, including holidays, professional development days, teacher workdays, and student holidays. Families should still confirm campus-specific events and emergency schedule changes with Pasadena ISD.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Pasadena ISD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official Pasadena ISD source linked on this page for the PDF-style calendar source. MySchoolDates also provides a searchable date table and a one-time calendar import file.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Pasadena ISD calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides a one-time .ics file generated from the reviewed Pasadena ISD calendar records. It can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook, but it will not automatically update if Pasadena ISD revises the official calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pasadena ISD graduation in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The district calendar lists the graduation window as May 20-21, 2027. Families should confirm ceremony times with their high school.

customSections.label: Printable Pasadena ISD Calendar PDF
customSections.content: Families looking for a printable Pasadena ISD calendar can open the official district calendar source linked on this page. MySchoolDates also reorganizes the same Pasadena ISD calendar dates into searchable sections and a one-time calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

groups.label: Download and print options
items: Use the official Pasadena ISD calendar source for the printable PDF-style calendar record.
Use the MySchoolDates calendar file when you want Pasadena ISD holidays, breaks, early dismissal dates, and no-school days in a personal calendar app.
Verify the official Pasadena ISD source before making critical travel, childcare, or transportation plans.

customSections.label: Pasadena ISD 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: This snapshot summarizes the highest-value Pasadena ISD calendar dates for parents, students, and staff planning the 2026-2027 school year, including vacation calendar windows, no-school days, early dismissal timing, and the longest break periods.

groups.label: Important planning dates
items: Fall Break gives families a long October planning window from October 9-13, 2026.
Winter Break is the longest scheduled student break and runs through January 1, 2027.
Students return after Winter Break on January 5, 2027.
Early dismissal dates may require adjusted pickup, transportation, or after-school care plans.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Pasadena ISD lists Fall Break from October 9 through October 13, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissal
yearNumbers.detail: Early dismissal is listed on December 18, 2026 and May 21, 2027.
